steps.title: Use the difficulty clues
steps.content: The colon explains why Stevens's poetry can be hard to do something: it is dense, experimental, and full of references, and many readers struggle to identify even the subjects.

steps.title: Choose understanding
steps.content: Choice B concerns preference, choice C means stop or break into something, and choice D means fail to notice. The difficulty described is a difficulty in understanding the poems, so "comprehend" fits. The answer is A.
